Charges as Source of Truth progressed — Multi-stack project (disputes, GraphQL, refund reads, completeness-audit dashboard) with multiple PRs merged and 4 commits pushed based on AI bot reviews throughout the week.
Production hotfixes and incident response — Fixed Christ Fellowship Transactions date range, debugged and scoped Crossroads donor identity crisis (busted people records), triaged and resolved RR7 regression and other critical issues.
Enhanced AI Code Review tooling — Landed self-improving learnings loop on Apollos Code Reviewer bot and improved Mary PR Poppins to reduce review noise and friction.
Auth on Web reverted to original design — Completed revert with Brandon and Jordan to restore intended behavior.
Giving flow debugging — Worked through giving sync and login regression issues with Brandon.
